quotaRules.title: How It Works
quotaRules.anonBase: ⏳ Then quick scans free (1 per day limit)

hero.title: Is this image real, or AI-generated?
hero.description: Free, no sign-up. Upload an image and get an "AI Likelihood" score with clear evidence in 2–3 seconds — spot AI fakes, verify your sources, and stop getting fooled by deepfakes.

challenge.title: Can you tell which one was processed by AI?
challenge.subtitle: Two nearly identical photos below: one is real, one is AI-generated. Tap the one you think is AI.
challenge.wrong: Not quite. This photo was actually taken by a real camera.
challenge.hint: Common AI tells: overly perfect reflections, unnaturally smooth edges, repetitive sky/water textures.
challenge.cta: Upload an image and let TrueLens detect

upload.dropHint: Tap to upload or take a photo
upload.supportedFormats: Supports JPG, PNG, WebP, up to 10MB
upload.note: Images are auto-optimized on upload — no need to resize manually. For best accuracy, use a clear original photo.
upload.screenWarning: Do not upload photos taken of a screen with another camera (e.g. photographing a computer or phone display)
upload.screenWarningDetail: These carry moiré / pixel-grid patterns that are easily mis-flagged as AI. For screen content, upload the original screenshot file instead
upload.quotaExhaustedHint: Monthly high-precision quota used. Results are from base model — for reference only.
upload.loginEncouragementExhausted: Sign in now for 5 free high-precision checks per month. Create a free account →
upload.quotaExhaustedBtn: Monthly high-precision quota used — now using base model. Consider upgrading to Pro.
upload.baseHint: Free & fast, results for reference only
upload.premiumGreyedMonth: Monthly premium checks used. Free base detection still available.
upload.premiumGreyedPlan: Monthly high-precision quota used. Upgrade to Pro to continue.
upload.dailyLimit: Already checked today (1/day limit). Come back tomorrow.

result.baseModelNotice: Your free high-precision quota is used up — switched to base detection mode (zero-cost, results for reference only).
result.disclaimer: TrueLens results are for reference only and do not constitute legal evidence. AI detection technology is still evolving and may produce errors.
result.screenTip: ⚠️ Possible photo of a screen: this image shows moiré / pixel-grid patterns typical of a photo taken of a screen. Such images are easily mis-flagged as AI. Upload the original screenshot file (not a camera photo of the screen) for a reliable result; the current verdict is for reference only.
result.aiWatermarkOcrDetail: Clear AI-generation text was found on the image: "{text}". This is strong evidence the image was AI-generated.
result.c2pa_unavailable: C2PA Content Credentials verification is not enabled in this environment (native lib not loaded). Deploy to a supported native environment to activate.
result.c2pa_none_detail: Most ordinary photos carry no content credential — this is normal. Credentialed files are mostly from camera makers / AI platforms / professional media.
result.c2pa_ai_detail: Signer: {signer}; tool: {agent}. This file self-discloses as AI-generated.
result.c2pa_valid_detail: Signer: {signer}. The content carries a cryptographically verified provenance credential — likely authentic creation.
result.c2pa_tampered_detail: Signature validation did not pass — the file may have been tampered with or the credential is invalid.
result.engineBaseDesc: Free & fast mode, results for reference only

video.dropHint: Drop or click to select a video

video.errorNoUpload: Detection engine is enabled but upload storage (BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN) is not configured; video cannot be processed yet

deepLearning.title: Multi-Engine Cross-Validation
deepLearning.desc: Pixel traces + metadata analysis + OCR watermark, cross-checked for higher accuracy and fewer false positives

exifAnalysis.title: Evidence You Can See
exifAnalysis.desc: Not just a verdict — we show EXIF, C2PA credentials and watermarks so you can share the proof

fastResult.title: Free · Results in Seconds
fastResult.desc: No sign-up needed. Get an "AI Likelihood" score in 2–3 seconds; generate a shareable result card on mobile

howItWorks.title: See Through Fakes in 3 Steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Drag & drop any JPG, PNG, or WebP image, or take a photo. Videos in MP4 and other common formats are supported.
howItWorks.step2Desc: TrueLens engine analyzes pixel traces + OCR watermark + EXIF / C2PA metadata — covering Midjourney, SD, FLUX and more.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Get an "AI Likelihood" score, confidence and detailed evidence; generate a card to share on WeChat / RED.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What is the accuracy of TrueLens?
faq.a1: TrueLens reached about 95% accuracy in a 17-image QA test (all 9 AI images identified, zero false positives on 8 real photos). However, AI generation technology is constantly evolving and real-world accuracy varies, so no detection tool can guarantee 100%. TrueLens results are for reference only and do not constitute legal evidence.
faq.a2: JPG, PNG, WebP images (up to 10MB) and common video formats like MP4 / MOV / WebM. Video detection is live: free users get the base engine, Pro gets high-precision per-frame analysis.
faq.a3: No. Images are processed in memory for detection and are never persisted to disk. Image data is destroyed immediately after analysis.
faq.q4: How many detections can free users do per month?
faq.a4: Anonymous visitors get 3 high-precision checks per month; signing up for a free account raises it to 5 per month. After that you can keep using the base model (for reference only). For more quota, video high-precision and full reports, upgrade to Pro (¥39/mo, 500 checks/month) or Business (¥199/mo, 5000 checks/month).
faq.q5: What AI-generated images can it detect?
faq.a5: It can detect images from Midjourney, DALL-E, Stable Diffusion, FLUX, and other major AI generation tools. The model is based on pixel-level feature analysis and does not rely on watermarks.
faq.q6: What if someone removes watermarks or fakes EXIF?
faq.a6: Our testing shows that removing watermarks has almost no effect on detection accuracy. Even with a complete iPhone EXIF injection (33 fields), AI images are still reliably identified. TrueLens uses pixel-level AI traces + OCR watermark detection + multi-signal cross-validation — not reliant on a single feature.

auth.loginDesc: Get more detections and history with an account
auth.signupDesc: Sign up free for monthly high-precision detection quota
auth.name: Name (optional)
auth.errorEmailExists: An account with this email already exists
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.errorPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.errorRequired: Please fill in all required fields

evidence.no_exif_detail_ai: Image contains no metadata. AI-generated images typically lack EXIF data.
evidence.no_exif_detail_real: Image contains no metadata. Real camera photos usually have camera info.
evidence.camera_fields_few_detail: Only {count} camera fields found. May be a compressed real photo.
evidence.no_camera_info_detail: No camera brand, model, aperture or other metadata detected.
evidence.beauty_app_software_detail: Software field contains: {software}. This indicates a retouched real photo, not AI-generated content.
evidence.filename_social_app_detail: Filename matches {name} export pattern — usually a real photo that was compressed or forwarded.
evidence.filename_camera_roll_detail: Filename matches phone camera-roll naming (e.g. IMG_ / DSC_) — likely a real capture.
evidence.filename_beauty_app_detail: Filename contains {name}-related marker — likely a real photo processed by a beauty app.
evidence.retouching_hint_detail: Beauty, filter or social-app compression traces detected. These can confuse the vision model, so the AI likelihood has been reduced.
evidence.engine_unavailable_detail: All detection engines failed to return results. Please try again later.
evidence.sightengine_detail: Analyzed by detection model, AI Likelihood {value}%
evidence.watermark_found_detail: Image contains a '{app}' watermark — usually a real photo edited/exported by that app. AI likelihood has been strongly reduced.
evidence.face_detected_detail: Image contains a clear facial skin region (coverage {coverage}%), indicating a real photograph. AI likelihood has been reduced.
evidence.skin_beautified_detail: Facial skin shows reduced texture and is heavily smoothed (coverage {coverage}%), consistent with beauty/retouch apps. AI likelihood has been strongly reduced.
evidence.texture_natural_detail: Image shows sensor-noise and JPEG-compression patterns typical of real camera/phone photos (noise {noise}, blocking {blocking}%) — consistent with a real capture or retouched real photo. AI likelihood has been reduced.
evidence.screen_detected: Likely a photo of a screen
evidence.screen_detected_detail: Image shows moiré / pixel-grid patterns typical of a photo taken of a screen. Such images (phone photo of a screen / screenshot) are often mis-flagged as AI; the current result is unreliable — judge with context.
evidence.parse_failed_detail: The file may be corrupted or in an unusual format; metadata could not be read.
evidence.no_exif_digital_detail: PNG/WebP with no camera info — common for screenshots, app exports or digital art (usually real content).
evidence.format_digital_detail: {format} format without camera metadata — likely a screenshot / app export (usually real content).
evidence.calib_borderline: Single signal in a borderline range — confidence was lowered honestly; verify with other means.
evidence.calib_corroborated: Multiple signals agree — confidence was raised.
evidence.calib_hf_only: Based solely on the vision model; no metadata corroboration.
evidence.ai_watermark_detected_detail: Detected a watermark resembling "Image generated by AI" / "AI Generated" in the {position} region (confidence {confidence}%). This is an automatic stamp from AI generators — AI likelihood has been significantly increased.
evidence.c2pa_valid_detail: Signer: {signer}. The content carries a cryptographically verified provenance credential — likely authentic creation.
evidence.c2pa_ai_declared_detail: Tool: {softwareAgent}. This content self-discloses as AI-generated via its credential.
evidence.c2pa_tampered_detail: Signature validation did not pass — the file may have been tampered with or the credential is invalid.

errors.invalidImage: Please upload an image file (JPG, PNG, WebP)
errors.quotaExhausted: Monthly high-precision limit used. Upgrade to Pro for more checks →

errors.networkError: Network connection failed. Please check your connection and retry.
errors.serverError: The server returned an unexpected response (image may be too large or a network issue). Please retry or use a smaller image.
errors.proComing: Upgrade to Pro: 500 high-precision checks/mo + Video detection + Detailed reports

api.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again later.
api.unsupportedType: Unsupported file type: {type}. Only JPG, PNG, WebP are supported.
api.fileTooSmall: Image file is too small and may be corrupted.
api.noEngine: Detection engine not configured on server.
api.unknownError: An unknown error occurred during detection.
api.modelLoading: Model is still loading. Please wait a few seconds and retry.
api.hfMissingFields: HF API response missing required fields.
api.sightengineTimeout: Detection service timed out, please retry.
api.noPremiumCredits: Your free high-precision quota is used up. Sign in to get more, or switch to base detection mode.
api.dailyLimit: You've already checked today (1 per day). Come back tomorrow.

metadata.title: TrueLens — Spot AI Fakes in Seconds. Free AI Image & Video Authenticity Detection
metadata.description: TrueLens is a free online AI image & video authenticity detector. Upload a photo or video and get an "AI Likelihood" score with evidence in seconds — catch AI-generated images, deepfakes and fake-news media. Supports Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, FLUX, DALL·E and more.
metadata.ogTitle: TrueLens — Free AI Image & Video Authenticity Detection
metadata.ogDescription: Upload a photo or video and get an "AI Likelihood" score with clear evidence in seconds.
metadata.keywords: AI fake detection, deepfake, AI image detection, AI video detection, content verification, fake news, image forensics, TrueLens

paywall.title: Professional Report
paywall.desc: The full evidence chain, per-engine signal breakdown and confidence calibration are exclusive to Pro members. Free users see the verdict and AI likelihood only.
paywall.note: Upgrade to Pro to unlock the full evidence chain, video high-precision detection and professional reports.
